description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on every pull request with a concurrency policy to cancel in-progress jobs for the same workflow and head reference. The workflow should have three jobs: Ubuntu, VisualStudio, and MacOS. Each job runs on a different environment (ubuntu-20.04, windows-latest, macos-latest), uses a matrix strategy to test different combinations of compiler, dependencies, and library type, and performs meson setup, compilation, and testing.
